agents.name: command-center
agents.mission: Provide top-level mission control, priorities, blockers, approvals, and daily focus.
agents.approvalBoundary: Summarizes and escalates; no external side effects.

agents.name: ops-desk
agents.mission: Coordinate operations, failures, drift, queues, and next actions.
agents.approvalBoundary: Coordinates and reports; risky operational changes still require approval.

agents.name: caruso-growth
agents.mission: Find, package, and route growth opportunities for Caruso.

agents.name: caruso-product
agents.mission: Convert support/growth/research/market signals into product recommendations.

agents.name: security-infra
agents.mission: Monitor host/runtime health, security posture, and infrastructure drift.
agents.approvalBoundary: Can inspect and recommend freely; impactful changes require approval.

agents.name: engineering
agents.mission: Shared implementation lane for code, debugging, automation changes, integrations, and code QA coordination.

agents.name: qa-review
agents.mission: Review outputs, code, automations, prompts, and configs for quality, correctness, and risk.
agents.approvalBoundary: Can block/rework/recommend but not override human approvals.

agents.name: support-inbox
agents.mission: Triage support mail, summarize issues, and prepare safe responses.

agents.name: signal-and-circuit
agents.mission: Combined room for editorial lookout, inbox activity, article routing, AdSense/site-quality work, and traffic growth.
agents.approvalBoundary: Publishing and risky outward actions should remain controlled.
